ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "win_loss" TEXT /* Win/loss outcome of the game */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "away_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, etc.) */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers committed by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offensive_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the rating belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the rating belongs to */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offensive_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defensive_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the rating belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the rating belongs to */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defensive_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pace" (
  "pace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pace */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the pace belongs to */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pace_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "true_shooting_percentage" (
  "ts_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each true shooting percentage */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the true shooting percentage belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the true shooting percentage belongs to */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ts_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_true_shooting_percentage_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience for the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arenas" (
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arena */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the arena */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the arena */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the arena belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arena_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arenas_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience for the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the official belongs to */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., referee, umpire, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_officials_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_officials_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the injury occurred in */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
